headline: Best Buy, CarMax, and Lowe's Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the spike in oil prices threatened to siphon another round of discretionary spending away from store registers.

headline: Best Buy (BBY) Valuation Check As New Membership Rewards And Price Changes Take Effect
summary: Best Buy (BBY) has updated its paid memberships, introducing a rewards points system starting June 4 that offers 1% back on eligible purchases, or 6% when using a My Best Buy Credit Card. See our latest analysis for Best Buy. Despite the membership revamp and upcoming price increase, Best Buy’s recent share price return has been weak, with declines of 4.01% over 1 day, 10.64% over 30 days and 16.68% year to date. At the same time, the 1 year total shareholder return of 10.01% and 5 year total...
